headlines.title: Iranian military says it's stopping strikes on Israel, but will resume if Israel attacks Lebanon
headlines.summary: Iran announced it is halting missile strikes against Israel but warned it will resume attacks if Israel strikes Lebanon. The statement follows a weekend of escalating tensions between the two countries.

headlines.title: At least 32 dead after magnitude-7.8 earthquake strikes southern Philippines
headlines.summary: A powerful 7.8 magnitude earthquake struck the southern Philippines, triggering small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia, and Japan. At least 32 people have been confirmed dead with buildings collapsed.

headlines.title: Armenia's pro-West government wins election despite Russian pressure
headlines.summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan's Civil Contract Party secured nearly 50% of the vote, comfortably beating other contenders in an election seen as a test of Armenia's pivot toward the West.

headlines.title: Pope Leo urges global leaders to stop dividing electorates with 'sterile simplifications'
headlines.summary: Pope Leo called on world leaders to listen to cries for peace as he met with migrants and approximately 600,000 young people at the start of a week-long event.

headlines.title: Fans express anger at US travel bans and visa restrictions affecting World Cup attendance
headlines.summary: Football fans across the world say US travel bans and visa regulations make them feel excluded from the World Cup, with many reporting difficulties obtaining entry to the United States.

headlines.title: 6 people hurt in stabbings at New York's Penn Station, suspect in custody
headlines.summary: Authorities report six people were injured in stabbing incidents at New York's Penn Station. A suspect has been taken into custody following the attacks.

headlines.title: Police search for suspects in Ohio shooting that wounded 12 near street festival
headlines.summary: Authorities in Toledo, Ohio are searching for suspects after a shooting near a street festival left 12 people wounded.

headlines.title: Rare footage captured of Great White shark in Mediterranean Sea
headlines.summary: A volunteer diver captured rare footage of an endangered Great White shark between Tunisia and Sicily, describing shaking during the encounter.

headlines.title: Knicks' NBA finals run electrifies New York City
headlines.summary: The New York Knicks' stunning winning streak has energized the city as the team prepares for the third game of the NBA finals series at its home arena.

headlines.title: FIFA says fans given free World Cup tickets must pay within seven days or lose seats
headlines.summary: FIFA announced that fans who were mistakenly given free tickets to World Cup group stage matches in Toronto must pay for them within seven days or lose the seats.
